arts.ttl: Liverpool Eyeing Move to Sign 'Superstar' Forward Who Plays Like Ronaldo
arts.sum: Liverpool are eyeing a potential move to sign Juventus sensation Kenan Yildiz this summer.

arts.ttl: I can't accept Nunez's work-rate - Slot
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot says he "can't accept" striker Darwin Nunez's work-rate in his past two games.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Newcastle United simulated to predict huge Premier League title clash
arts.sum: Liverpool take on Newcastle United at Anfield on Wednesday evening, so we simulated the clash to predict the outcome.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United's 'no excuses' team selection policy revealed as Eddie Howe gets ruthless
arts.sum: Eddie Howe has fired a "no excuses" message to any player who does not make his team sheet tonight at Anfield. When asked about the battle for places, Howe told Chronicle Live: "That's what you want, you need the competition and you need people performing well to drive standards and to drive the quality of our training.

arts.ttl: “I’m at a place I absolutely love” – Man City will find it difficult to prise Newcastle ace away
arts.sum: This summer could be an important one for Pep Guardiola as he’ll need to refresh his Man City squad, however, it’s going to be difficult to land one Newcastle United ace. It’s believed that there will be a clear out at Man City, headed by brilliant Belgian midfielder, Kevin De Bruyne. arts.ttl: Revealed: Liverpool targeting £60m-rated Premier League star to replace key figure
arts.sum: Liverpool are understood to be on the lookout for a new left-back to replace Andrew Robertson for next season. And one of the names now increasingly high up on the Reds’ list is Newcastle United’s talented young defender Lewis Hall, sources have informed CaughtOffside. The 20-year-old has impressed at St James’ Park after previously also […] The post Revealed: Liverpool targeting £60m-rated Premier League star to replace key figure appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United make strong vow after Liverpool diehard turned the air blue
arts.sum: A number of Liverpool fans who stayed behind after the final whistle ended up booing Newcastle players and staff off the field with one supporter even repeatedly roaring: "YOU F------ DESERVED THAT!" However, following the 2-1 loss, Howe said his 'ideal' was that his side were 'booed off every week' on the road because they 'don't want to be popular'. Eddie Howe has vowed Newcastle United will do 'everything in their power' to finally get a result at Anfield.

arts.ttl: What TV channel is Liverpool vs Newcastle on? How to watch Premier League match
arts.sum: Liverpool have the perfect opportunity to take one step closer towards the Premier League title, but they must first face an always dangerous Newcastle United side

arts.ttl: Arne Slot has given game away about transfer plan as Liverpool and Arsenal face summer fight
arts.sum: Liverpool and Arsenal are both likely to be in the market for new number nines this season as they both prepare to face exactly what they are lacking on Wednesday night
